rationale: Post-earnings-sympathy-rally pullback. No own catalyst until May earnings. April 2 showed strong selling pressure (-10.4%). Expect consolidation in 900-1000 range. Slightly bearish bias due to mean reversion from April 1 spike and lack of near-term catalyst.

Post-first-earnings release. April 1 +32% was the earnings surprise pop, April 2 -15% is profit-taking. Earnings catalyst now priced in. Widening losses (4.72B yuan) may weigh on sentiment. However GLM-5V-Turbo launch provides some support. Expect continued pullback to 700-750 range as initial euphoria fades.

1-month view tilts bullish: own earnings ~May 7 could be a catalyst (ARR >50M suggests strong Q1 2026). M2.5 model gaining traction. Analyst consensus target HK,055 provides anchor. Risk: market-wide selloff if macro deteriorates. Low confidence due to extreme volatility and thin data.

Earnings catalyst exhausted. Next catalyst unclear. GLM-5 adoption growth needs time to show in revenue. Extremely high valuation (>250x revenue) limits upside. But domestic AI narrative and Huawei chip alignment provide floor. Expect range-bound 650-850 trading. Low confidence - this is the hardest to call.
